headline: Lawmakers Query Iran War Cost as Trump Renews Strike Threats
summary: (Bloomberg) -- US lawmakers pressed Pentagon chiefs for details on the mounting costs of America’s deadlocked war with Iran, amid signs the conflict is pushing up consumer prices at home too. President Donald Trump said the Islamic Republic will be “decimated” if a deal can’t be reached.
